name: Computer Science & Programming
description: From the world's first programmer to the architects of modern AI, women have shaped every era of computing — writing the code, building the compilers, and designing the systems that power our digital world.
descriptionCn: 从世界上第一位程序员到现代AI的缔造者，女性塑造了计算机发展的每一个时代——编写代码、构建编译器、设计驱动数字世界的系统。

name: Mathematics
description: Across millennia, women mathematicians have unlocked the language of the universe — from ancient Alexandria to modern Fields Medal stages, proving theorems that reshape our understanding of reality.
descriptionCn: 跨越千年，女性数学家解开了宇宙的语言——从古代亚历山大到现代菲尔兹奖舞台，证明了重塑我们对现实理解的定理。

name: Physics
description: Women physicists have split the atom, discovered dark matter, and unraveled the fabric of spacetime — often against institutional barriers that sought to keep them invisible.
descriptionCn: 女性物理学家分裂了原子、发现了暗物质、揭示了时空的结构——常常是在试图使她们隐形的制度壁垒面前完成的。

name: Chemistry
description: From decoding DNA's double helix to editing the genome itself, women chemists have transformed medicine, materials, and our molecular understanding of life.
descriptionCn: 从解码DNA的双螺旋到编辑基因组本身，女性化学家改变了医学、材料科学以及我们对生命分子层面的理解。

name: Biology & Medicine
description: Women in biology and medicine have pioneered life-saving treatments, decoded genetic mysteries, and championed the health of our planet's ecosystems.
descriptionCn: 生物与医学领域的女性开创了挽救生命的治疗方法，解码了遗传之谜，捍卫了地球生态系统的健康。

name: Astronomy & Space
description: Women have mapped the stars, measured the cosmos, and ventured beyond Earth — charting humanity's path through the universe from observatory floors to orbit.
descriptionCn: 女性绘制了星图、测量了宇宙、走出了地球——从天文台到太空轨道，为人类描绘穿越宇宙的航路。

name: Engineering & Invention
description: Women engineers and inventors have built bridges, created bulletproof materials, pioneered wireless communication, and launched rockets — literally constructing the modern world.
descriptionCn: 女性工程师和发明家建造了桥梁、创造了防弹材料、开创了无线通信、发射了火箭——切实地构建了现代世界。

name: Earth & Environmental Science
description: Women earth scientists have discovered our planet's inner core, mapped the ocean floor, and sounded the alarm on climate change — revealing the forces that shape our world.
descriptionCn: 女性地球科学家发现了地球内核、绘制了海底地图、敲响了气候变化的警钟——揭示了塑造我们世界的力量。

name: Genetics & Biotechnology
description: Women geneticists and biotechnologists have mapped the HIV genome, discovered cancer genes, and invented the mRNA vaccines that saved millions of lives.
descriptionCn: 女性遗传学家和生物技术专家绘制了HIV基因组图谱、发现了癌症基因、发明了拯救了数百万人生命的mRNA疫苗。

name: Data Science & AI
description: From NASA's hidden figures to the pioneers of ethical AI, women have been at the forefront of data science — computing trajectories, building learning systems, and demanding algorithmic justice.
descriptionCn: 从NASA的'隐藏人物'到AI伦理的先驱，女性一直处于数据科学的前沿——计算轨道、构建学习系统、倡导算法公正。
